title: A Dust-Caked Attic
lines: You scramble up a rickety ladder into a low-ceilinged storage space. The smell of cedar and stale air is thick here.
Your flashlight beam catches dust motes dancing in the dark. Piles of boxes and old furniture create a labyrinth of shadows.
On the wall, several frantic, charcoal sketches show silhouettes of creatures that look nothing like humans.

options.desc: 3. Open the heavy trunk beneath the sketches
